title: Neru totem
description: 该材质包将游戏中的不死图腾改为NERU主题样式，采用其标志性色调This texture pack changes the in-game undead totem to a Hatsune NERU-themed style, using her signature color scheme.
body: ![NERU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd8321a8d6764b28235fdc72e5e2a30ff63c02c_0.webp)该材质包将游戏中的不死图腾改为NERU主题样式，采用其标志性色调This texture pack changes the in-game undead totem to a Hatsune NERU-themed style, using her signature color scheme.
